title: Tinker Time
description:
Navigating through an [red][sine]endless sea of corpses[/sine][/red], you find a [orange]mad scientist[/orange] scavenging for various scraps.

“Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next [green]atrocity device[/green]! How about it?”

options.title: Accept
options.description: Create a custom [gold]Mad Science[/gold] card to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Choking
options.description: Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses [blue]6[/blue] HP.

options.title: Chaos
options.description: Add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It’s free to play this turn.

options.title: Improvement
options.description: At the end of combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

notes:
This is a three-step event. First, choose a card type (shown 2 of 3 at random). Then choose a rider effect (shown 2 of 3 at random from the type-specific pool). The resulting [gold]Mad Science[/gold] card combines both.

[gold]Attack (Weapon) riders[/gold]: Sapping, Violence, Choking
[gold]Skill (Protector) riders[/gold]: Energized, Wisdom, Chaos
[gold]Power (Gadget) riders[/gold]: Expertise, Curious, Improvement

The base Attack deals [blue]12[/blue] damage; the base Skill gains [blue]8[/blue] Block. When a Violence Attack is played, it hits [blue]3[/blue] times total (original + 2 extra).
